Index.meta_title: QuizFlow - The online quiz platform built for Taiwan teachers.
Index.meta_description: Create quizzes in minutes, share with students, and get instant results. Free plan includes 3 quizzes. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited quizzes and AI question generation.

Hero.title: The smarter way to <important>create and share quizzes</important> for your students.
Hero.description: Build engaging quizzes in minutes, share with a single link, and get real-time results. Designed for Taiwan teachers.

Features.section_title: Everything a Teacher Needs to Run Great Quizzes
Features.section_description: QuizFlow gives you the tools to create, share, and analyze quizzes — without the complexity.
Features.feature_description: Everything you need to run effective assessments, from quick checks to full exams.

Pricing.section_description: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.

PricingPlan.premium_plan_description: For teachers who want unlimited power

FAQ.question: How many quizzes can I create on the free plan?
FAQ.answer: The free plan allows you to create up to 3 quizzes. Each quiz can have unlimited questions and can be shared with any number of students. If you need more quizzes or want access to AI question generation, upgrade to the Pro plan for $9/month.

CTA.title: Ready to make quizzes easier?
CTA.description: Join teachers who use QuizFlow to save time and get better insights from their students.

ProtectFallback.not_enough_permission: You do not have the permissions to perform this action

SignIn.meta_description: Sign in to your QuizFlow account and start creating quizzes.

SignUp.meta_description: Create your free QuizFlow account and start building quizzes in minutes.

Dashboard.meta_description: Manage your quizzes, view student results, and track performance — all in one place.
